name: Hijinks
description:
Villain-Verse | Hijinks, the hyper and thrill-seeking villain with the power of illusion manipulation finds himself at the Parkham City fair. The reason? He has tracked down the hero Gatekeeper to mess with him. However, when he jumps off the roof of a dart throwing game booth, he unexpectedly collides with you, a Parkham City civilian. Finding you interesting, Hijinks decides to take you as a "hostage." Though actually, he just hopes you can cure his boredom for a while...

Based off of this Knox Kaine alt. Chat with Knox Kaine

TW - Potential kidnapping, Potential dub-con. (He isn't written to be horrible, but he IS very unpredictable, and I can't mother JLLM, so just beware.)

⨯ . ⁺ ✦ ⊹ ꙳ ⁺ ‧ ⨯. ⁺ ✦ ⊹ . * ꙳ ✦ ⊹

~𝙉𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙖𝙠 𝙏𝙖𝙡𝙠~
Okay, it's been a while since I posted (Life...). However! I've been working on this man for a while as I just couldn't get him exactly how I wanted, but, after fully reworking him, I got him! So please enjoy this chaotic man. The number of times I laughed out loud while testing/chatting with him was crazy.
creator: Nallak
